query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn in DnD 5e without using any class features or abilities?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition, you can cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without using any class features or abilities, provided you follow certain rules regarding actions and

answer: Yes, according to the provided rules, you can cast a spell with a casting time of 1 bonus action and make a weapon attack as separate actions on the same turn.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is relevant to the user query but contains a significant mistake. It incorrectly states that you can cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any class features or abilities, which contradicts the rules of DnD 5e.
